problem: Need a production-ready full-stack application scaffold with CI/CD, Docker support, and clear separation between backend API and frontend SPA so the team can start building features on day one.
primaryUser: Engineering team — 2 backend devs, 1 frontend dev, 1 DevOps
successCriteria: Running Docker Compose with working API + SPA; all tests green; CI pipeline configured; README covers local setup in under 5 minutes.

stories.title: Project Scaffold
stories.description: Generate monorepo structure with packages/api and packages/web, shared tsconfig, ESLint, Prettier, Husky pre-commit hooks, and root-level Makefile.

stories.title: Backend API Skeleton
stories.description: Express + TypeScript REST API with health check endpoint, request validation middleware, error handler, and Swagger docs auto-generated from OpenAPI spec.

stories.title: Frontend SPA Skeleton
stories.description: Vite + React + TypeScript SPA with routing, global state slice, design-token CSS, and Storybook configured.

stories.title: Docker + CI/CD
stories.description: Multi-stage Dockerfiles for api and web, docker-compose.yml for local dev, GitHub Actions workflow for build + test + push to GHCR.

stackConstraints: Node 20 LTS, TypeScript 5, pnpm workspaces, PostgreSQL 16
openQuestions: Should the API include JWT auth scaffold or leave that for a separate story?
Which database ORM: Prisma vs Drizzle?

modelRecommendation.estimatedCostNote: Estimated $0.80–$1.50 for full plan synthesis using recommended models
